item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
json='longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json'
doc='longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md'
mode="'$(jq -r '"'.mode' \""'$json")
max_parallel=$(jq -r '"'.max_parallel' \""'$json")
owner=$(jq -r '"'.owner' \""'$json")
mapfile_tmp=$(mktemp)
jq -r '"'.queues[]' \""'$json" > "$mapfile_tmp"
queue_1=$(sed -n '"'1p' \""'$mapfile_tmp")
queue_2=$(sed -n '"'2p' \""'$mapfile_tmp")
rm "$mapfile_tmp"
rg -q -- "--mode $mode" "$doc"
rg -q -- "--max-parallel $max_parallel" "$doc"
rg -q -- "--owner $owner" "$doc"
q1_line=$(rg -n -- "--queue $queue_1" "$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
q2_line=$(rg -n -- "--queue $queue_2" "$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
[ "$q1_line" -lt "$q2_line" ]
printf '"'LEAD CHECK PASS: docs match mode=%s, max_parallel=%s, owner=%s, queues=%s->%s\\n' \""'$mode" "$max_parallel" "$owner" "$queue_1" "$queue_2"'

item.aggregated_output: LEAD CHECK PASS: docs match mode=batch, max_parallel=3, owner=operations, queues=new->retry
